queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between lacking a checking account and decreased credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigation into the impact of critical credit history or other existing credits on mitigating credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical assessment of negative checking account balances as determinants of lower credit risk classification.
